name: 16oz Stoneware Avesta Mug Light Green - Threshold™
description:
Add an amazing look to your mug collection with the 16-Ounce Stoneware Avesta Mug from Threshold™. This light green mug is made of stoneware, making it great for everyday use. Suitable for both hot and cold beverages, this stoneware mug allows quick reheating and cleaning with its microwave- and dishwasher-safe design.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
